# User Demo Lab Runbook

The v16 additions provide browser-local demos for non-technical visitors.

## Routes

- `/start.html` — guided first-run path.
- `/demo-lab.html` — autonomous local proof-cycle demos.
- `/mission-studio.html` — local GoalOS proof-pack composer.
- `/proof-cards.html` — copyable stakeholder proof cards.

## Boundaries

No user accounts, no forms, no analytics, no cookies, no local/session storage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token availability, no factual certification, no production activation, and no fund authorization.

Users must not enter personal, confidential, regulated, wallet, seed phrase, private-key, or customer data.
